title: lepidium keniense
intro: Lepidium keniense, also known as African cabbage or kohlrabi, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium keniense include its potential to aid in the management of blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Lepidium keniense can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or infusion for its medicinal properties, and it is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
